thesis: AFTER-HOURS window (17:00-ET slot) — the next-trading-day plan on the latest live tick (deterministic snapshot asOf 2026-07-22T20:48:22Z, ~16:48 ET Wednesday 7/22). HONEST LABELING: this lane runs the after-hours window, but the snapshot self-labels window='pre-close' while its asOf ~16:48 ET sits right at/just after the 4:00pm cash close and marketClosed=false — so this is a LATE live intraday tick for 7/22, NOT a confirmed settled 7/22 daily close; snapshot.nextSessionDate is still 2026-07-22 (it has NOT rolled to 7/23), so the plan is authored for that date as the system defines it (positioning into the close and overnight). STRUCTURE FIRST: the extended tech-led structural bull is still DIGESTING near all-time highs and the index/leadership split PERSISTS; vs the 18:48Z pre-close read it SOFTENED marginally at the margin rather than firming further. What still holds: SPY 747.41 stays bull-stacked (20>50>200) and above its 50-day (~744.1) but eased to +0.45% over it (from +0.59% at the pre-close read) and is now -1.35% off the ATH (~757.6, from -1.21%), with VIX low and drifting slightly lower at 16.64 (band 16.6, -0.36 vs the 17.0 pre-close read). What softened: SPMO 150.07 GAVE BACK the 50-day reclaim it printed at the pre-close (ma50Dist now -0.23, from +0.19; mom5 +0.05, from +0.48) — a small leadership NEGATIVE this run, though its broader 20>200 stack holds. What is still UNWON: QQQ 705.35 stays TANGLED and -1.86% below its 50-day (~718.7) — the gap WIDENED (from -1.59%) with mom5 -1.73 — the reclaim it never won stays unwon; VGT 115.62 tangled (ma50Dist -0.74, mom5 -0.76) softer; MSFT 390.34 is still bear-stacked and -2.46% below its 50-day (~400.2, slightly less below than -2.84%), -10.49% below its 200-day. Persistence by distinct COMPLETED daily bars: 7 confirmed (7/09->7/10->7/13->7/14->7/15->7/16->7/17); the snapshot's nextSessionDate is unchanged at 7/22 this run, so no additional settled bars are enumerated — the theme extends to ~9 distinct completed daily bars (7/09->7/21) as an INFERRED extension from the earlier date roll; today 7/22 is a live intraday tick — NOT counted — and intraday reruns are not counted. FRAME: SPMO 20>200 stack holds but it slipped just under its 50-day / VGT tangled — both still soft on 21-day (SPMO mom21 -7.17, VGT mom21 -3.94). ROTATION: the owning sector RRG refreshed THIS run (asOf 2026-07-22T20:48:22Z) reads 'Rotate toward XLRE as XLV weakens'. Anti-whipsaw: treat this as one Leading rate-sensitive + energy 'into' cluster funded from weakening healthcare rather than chasing the specific name: XLRE Leading (rsRatio 100.38>100, accel +1.5, into, +7.39% over its 200-day) AND XLE Leading (rsRatio 100.78>100, rsMom 102.11 board-best, accel +1.12, into, +15.0% over its 200-day, commodity-confirmed: carried real-assets PDBC 69.7 Uptrend, commodity breadth 75) are BOTH the leading 'into' names, versus XLV Weakening (rsMom 98.23, accel -2.72, out) and XLI Weakening (out); XLK is Basing up (rsMom 99.78<100, accel +0.51) — no longer a clean 'into'. Semis re-rated Leading (SOXX rsMom 100.12, accel +1.09) but internals stay THIN (rsMom1m -15.59, above-50 4/12, up-momentum 3/12). TACTICAL, last: monthly OPEX (7/17) is RESOLVED and dealer gamma has RESET — prior pin/wall/magnet values are DEAD; fresh post-OPEX gamma walls, the pin/magnet, VIX9D/VIX3M term structure and the live 7/29 FedWatch path are NOT in this run and MUST be re-pulled before sizing any gamma trade, vol-term claim or Fed positioning. PLAN into the close and overnight: HOLD the bull-stack and do NOT chase index beta into ATH resistance while QQQ is tangled below its 50-day and SPMO has slipped back under its own (SPY's reclaim still needs QQQ to confirm the broadening); ROTATE toward the confirmed Leading rate-sensitive/energy 'into' cluster (XLRE per this run, XLE the commodity-confirmed board-best) over weakening XLV; TRIM stretched, still internally-thin semis into any close strength; HOLD (don't chase) MSFT still below its 50-day into the 7/29 capex guide; carry a small defined-risk hedge overnight toward the underpriced 7/29 hike tail — a low, slightly lower VIX keeps it cheap, not less necessary — after re-verifying the live path; stay OUT of precious-metal havens (GLD 17.4 washed / SLV 0).
